$schema-note: Declarative classification of every vendored tooling file. Read by docs-defrag (via diff-tooling.sh) to decide how to merge a newer SSOT version into a satellite. Paths are relative to a satellite's .cursor/skills/ directory. Glob '**' matches nested files.

classes.managed: Always taken hard from the SSOT on update. Behavior/contract files a satellite must not fork. A local edit here is reported and overwritten.
classes.local-overridable: A satellite may adapt these. On update, local edits are preserved and the upstream improvement is merged in semantically; true conflicts are reported, never silently overwritten.

rules.why: Shared check/verify scripts are the tooling contract; identical across all satellites.
Boilerplate describing the asset folder; not meant to be edited per repo.
Pattern prose a repo may extend with local conventions.
Provenance stamp; rewritten by docs-defrag after a successful update, never hand-edited.
Workflow wording a repo may tune; merge to keep local tuning + upstream improvements.
